{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323055615C84C9B79460B0BE98621"}"},"total":40},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7471050871301751577","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可读性很强，破译了中年妇女的一生生活方式，只要积极乐观面对生活，勤劳善良的人是可以活出自己的幸福人生。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739495009,"group_id":"7442238885926554686","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9xcGYmGkDzlbkc015NsusldNnUV/C8FcVN5EzV4YM2X","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/022c17471b714d8b95dbb490f5c1d56c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793243&x-signature=PXHCQZOn7ZR7nejohLIHGj2%2Byc8%3D","user_id":"3883900347624967","user_name":"矜彤彤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3883900347624967","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7442238885926554686","book_info":{"abstract":"【银发文、群像文、离婚、真假女儿、创业、女性成长文、中午女人成功逆袭】
楚月琴当了近三十年的家庭主妇，没有工作没有收入的她受尽了婆家一家人的嘲讽和打压，尽管她尽心尽力的伺候着家里的每一个人，可她在婆家一家人眼中，只不过是一个低下的保姆而已。
当她得知，自己亲手养的大的儿子，竟然是丈夫和小三所生，而自己的亲生女儿，在刚出生的那一天就被自己的丈夫和婆婆所遗弃。
出轨的丈夫，难缠的婆婆，心机小三和好吃懒做的小姑都让她心力交瘁。
她要离婚，她要为自己而活。
离婚后，她和自己的好朋友莲花两个人，开始摆摊创业，各自过上属于自己的幸福。
并寻找自己的亲生女儿……
因果循环，善有善报 恶有恶报。
最后她嫁给了疼爱自己的丈夫，一家过着幸福快乐的生活。
当那个曾经自以为是的教授丈夫，以为女人离开他只能过着社会上最底层人生活时，女人靠自己的努力却狠狠的打了他们一家人的脸……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fcb1fd4b38cb6b7d2498d19ed7ba53b3","author":"清清之水","author_id":"","book_id":"7442238885926554686","book_name":"五十岁才是人生中最好的年华","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#586828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8195人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":125,"name":"家庭","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=125&name=家庭&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7442239622274351678","read_count":"8195","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"489410"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"234","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,家庭,虐渣,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e2e24eed6de41b0e59b7893c5d77dcd1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779400575&x-signature=OeiRtcxm%2FP7mJT4UtmhgIqgnmi0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4015069066693396","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"44"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323055615C84C9B79460B0BE98621"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8581,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16490,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":2
